title: astragalus emoryanus var. terlinguensis
intro: Astragalus emoryanus var. terlinguensis, also known as Terlingua milkvetch, is a plant species belonging to the pea family Fabaceae. It is a perennial legume native to the Trans-Pecos region of Texas, USA. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its adaptogenic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus emoryanus var. terlinguensis include reducing stress and anxiety, improving immune function, and supporting respiratory health, which can be prepared through herbal teas, infusions, or extracts.
